mapper.select: select * from userlogin where userName = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND isDelete = 0
select * from userlogin where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND isDelete = 0
mapper.insert: insert into userlogin (userId, userName, platformAccount, platformName, lastEnterServerId, data, createTime, isDelete, lastLoginIp, lastEnterRoleId) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{platformAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{platformName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastEnterServerId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{lastLoginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastEnterRoleId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update userlogin set lastEnterServerId = #{lastEnterServerId,jdbcType=INTEGER},data = #{data,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},lastLoginIp=#{lastLoginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},lastEnterRoleId = #{lastEnterRoleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update userlogin set isDelete = 1 where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update userlogin set isDelete = 1 where userName = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update userlogin set isDelete = 0 where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
